body.title: urgency-provenance habit — why is that important?
body.result: trace_urgency_provenance() tool + PROC_WHY_IMPORTANT habit. Classifies hot TWM items grounded vs manufactured, auto-lowers manufactured urgency in range 0.31-0.64. cortex.twm_lower_urgency() added.
body.description: Trigger: why is that important / why does that matter / what makes that urgent. Reads hot TWM items, traces source+interpretive edges, classifies grounded (user message, goal, high-importance memory) vs manufactured (push source default, scheduler, NE arc). Auto-lowers urgency on ungrounded items. Design principle: urgency must be grounded in content not delivery mechanism — Igor is built to resist phone-addiction dynamics not replicate them.
